title: nasturtium alyssoides
intro: Nasturtium alyssoides, also known as tumble mustard or alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, including sore throats, colds, and skin irritations, due to their health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Nasturtium alyssoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
